title: saxifraga bronchialis subsp. vespertina
intro: Saxifraga bronchialis subsp. vespertina, also known as the alpine saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Saxifraga bronchialis subsp. vespertina include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the mucous membranes, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
